steps.name: demo-asset-inventory-and-storyboard
steps.summary: E2E1 added scripts/e2e_demo_asset_inventory.py, tests/test_e2e_demo_asset_inventory.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-e2e1-demo-asset-inventory.md. The demo story now orders parser, controlled source lane, workflow, retriever, and operator evidence into one public-safe storyboard.

steps.name: scenario-contract
steps.summary: E2E2 added scripts/e2e_scenario_contract.py, tests/test_e2e_scenario_contract.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-e2e2-scenario-contract.md. The scenario now has stage-level input, evidence, output, review checkpoint, operator command, and failure boundary contracts for parser, source lane, workflow, retriever, and operator stages.
